name: Creamy Egg and Vegetable Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cook potatoes and onion, covered, in boiling salted water for 5 minutes.
2. Add mixed vegetables and cook an additional 5 minutes, or until tender; drain well.
3. Meanwhile, prepare the sauce: In a medium saucepan, stir together milk, cornstarch, bouillon granules, and pepper. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
4. Stir in cheese and mustard until cheese is melted.
5. Spray an 8x1 1/2-inch round baking dish with Pam cooking spray.
6. Spread the vegetables at the bottom of the dish.
7. Top with the egg slices.
8. Pour sauce over all ingredients in the dish.
9. Bake, uncovered, in a 350°F oven for 20 minutes.
10. Arrange tomato slices on top.
11. Continue baking, uncovered, an additional 5 minutes, or until heated through.
